---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new platform adapter
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is the user need?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope

- [ ] New platform adapter (which site?)
- [ ] UI change
- [ ] Core routing/geocoding
- [ ] Performance / caching
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or links to relevant prior art.
